verifications.title: Churn metric is MRR-based, not customer-count
verifications.content: Churn rate = MRR lost from churned accounts / total MRR at period start. Revenue-based, calculated monthly.
verifications.user_quote: No, that's wrong. Our churn metric is MRR lost from churned accounts divided by total MRR at the start of the period. It's revenue-based, not customer-count based.
